title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Coursera India International Enterprises in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!
